products.name: DX-1000 Mobile Command Vehicle
products.descriptor: Van-based mobile command vehicle with integrated UAS C2 and communications

evidence.snippet: The DX-1000 Mobile Command Vehicle line is a **critical enabler** for modern command-and-control operations, delivering a comprehensive specialty vehicle platform adaptable to multiple mission roles. Built on Ford Transit or Mercedes Sprinter chassis, the DX-1000 can be configured with off-road capability for operations across any terrain.

products.name: DX-1000 ESDS (Event Security Defense System)
products.descriptor: DX-1000 configured for event security with counter-UAS and surveillance integration

evidence.snippet: The DX-1000 ESDS can be operated as easily as any full-size SUV. it does not require a special license or certification to operate effectively. It can be moved from location easily and discreetly when necessary.

products.name: Mobile Command Vehicles
products.descriptor: Family of van-based mobile command vehicles for UAS and field operations

evidence.snippet: The DX-1000 Mobile Command Vehicle line is a **critical enabler** for modern command-and-control operations, delivering a comprehensive specialty vehicle platform adaptable to multiple mission roles. Built on Ford Transit or Mercedes Sprinter chassis, the DX-1000 can be configured with off-road capability for operations across any terrain.

products.name: DX-816
products.descriptor: 8.5×16 ft extended-height mobile command trailer with electric power option

evidence.snippet: The DX-816 delivers a new level of situational awareness for all stakeholders and is designed into an 8.5′ × 16′ extended-height trailer, with multiple trailer lengths available. Built for adaptability and endurance, the DX-816 is now also offered with a fully electric power option—supporting quiet, sustainable, and resilient field operations.

products.name: DX-820
products.descriptor: Mobile command trailer variant used by Army Devcom

evidence.snippet:
#### Model Name: DX-820
#### Orgnization: ARMY Devcom

products.name: Mobile Command Trailers & Towables
products.descriptor: Family of towable command trailers with integrated UAS and communications systems

evidence.snippet: Draxxon’s mobile command trailers and towables are a **critical enabler** for rapid, flexible command capability—providing a comprehensive command center platform suited for multiple mission profiles. These systems enable agencies and organizations to integrate UAS flight operations with other command-and-control systems, extending operational reach without sacrificing capability.

products.name: Portable Ground Control Stations
products.descriptor: Ruggedized Pelican case GCS with daylight-viewable displays for UAS operations

evidence.snippet: Draxxon Portable Ground Control Stations are portable command stations integrated into a rugged Pelican case configuration. DAYLIGHT VIEWABLE DISPLAYS provide situational awareness for everyone involved in the operation and the ability to view data and imagery, in real-time. This creates an enhanced level of real time situational awareness not seen until now.
